title: Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer
summary: A developer shares their journey running the 744B-parameter GLM 5.2 Mixture-of-Experts LLM on a modest 32GB RAM laptop by converting to int4 and streaming routed experts from disk. They built Colibrì, a single-file C engine that keeps ~17B dense parameters in RAM (~9.9GB) and loads ~21,504 experts on demand with LRU caching, achieving ~0.1 tok/s. No GPU or Python runtime required.
